calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, 512 Frederick Street is present.
Attorney, Daniel Conrad, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Rick Alsrette, is present.
Defendant is in Pro Per.
The Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties went on record and stipulated to the following: (1) Tenant will move out by 5pm on Sept. 30, 2010. (2) Any items left in unit after tenant vacates or after Sept. 30, 2010 can and will be disposed by landlord without liability to tenant. Landlord has no duty to notify tenant. (3) If the tenant moves out by Sept. 30, 2010 the landlord will file a dismissal of action and waive back rent. (4) If tenant does not move out ny Sept. 30, 2010 the landlord can have immediate judgment, file ex parte for A. restitution, B.$6,723.70. Landlord will be prevailing party. (5) No security deposit. (6) Tenant releases all claims againt landlord.

Trial date of SEP-13-2010 is vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Off Calendar
